name: Gladiator Beast Retiari
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣闘獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>グラディアルビースト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>レティアリィ
desc: When this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster: You can target 1 card in your opponent's GY; banish it. At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can shuffle it into the Deck; Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, except "Gladiator Beast Retiari".
mnst_eff: When this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster: You can target 1 card in your opponent's GY; banish it. At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can shuffle it into the Deck; Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, except "Gladiator Beast Retiari".
eff: When this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster: You can target 1 card in your opponent's GY; banish it. At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can shuffle it into the Deck; Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, except "Gladiator Beast Retiari".

action: Returns itself from field to Deck for cost
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
